name: ChatGPT
description: The world's most popular AI assistant by OpenAI. Versatile for writing, coding, reasoning, and creative tasks.

name: Grok
description: Built by xAI with real-time knowledge from X. Helpful, witty, and maximally truth-seeking AI.

name: DeepSeek
description: Powerful open-source focused AI from China. Excellent at coding, math, and cost-effective reasoning.

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's safe and helpful AI assistant. Excellent at analysis, writing, and nuanced reasoning.

name: Gemini
description: Google's most capable multimodal AI. Deeply integrated with Search, Docs, and the Google ecosystem.

name: Mistral
description: Fast and efficient open-weight models from Europe. Ideal for developers and custom deployments.

name: Meta AI
description: Meta's powerful open-source Llama models. Free to use, modify, and deploy anywhere.

name: Perplexity
description: AI-powered search engine with real-time web access. Gives cited, accurate answers instantly.

name: Copilot
description: Microsoft's AI assistant powered by GPT-4. Built into Windows, Office, and the entire Microsoft 365 suite.

name: Gemma
description: Lightweight open models from Google DeepMind. Optimized for on-device and low-resource AI tasks.

name: Falcon
description: High-performance open-source LLM from the UAE. Strong multilingual and Arabic language capabilities.

name: Qwen
description: Alibaba's powerful multilingual model. Excels in Asian languages, coding, and mathematical reasoning.
